$comment: D-CSUBSET-VLA C2: the runtime witness that `sizeof <vla-object>` is a genuine runtime value (a Load of the decl-frozen size slot), the size_t element-count idiom `sizeof a / sizeof a[0]` on a VLA, the absolute byte size, and freeze-at-decl (C 6.7.6.2p2). The baseline arm proves the runtime Load + the C1a/C1b VLA substrate; the arm64 leg proves it on the non-host target (the slot Load is agnostic MIR, but the whole VLA frame under it is arm64-specific). The `release` arm proves the sizeof Load + the hidden fixed size slot survive the full optimizer (Mem2Reg/DCE never fold a VLA sizeof to a constant nor drop the decl-point Store). exitCode 42 = n; return 1/2 are the in-program absolute-bytes and freeze-at-decl pins.
